desc: Acknowledge a comment mutation (edit, delete, or post) on a work object entity. Apps call this endpoint to confirm they have processed a comment action, and the backend emits a dedicated RTM event to the user.

trigger_id.desc: A reference to the original user action that initiated the comment mutation

comment.desc: The full comment data. Required for edit and post actions. See the [comment schema](/messaging/work-objects-comments#entity-present-comments-method) for the full list of properties.

error.desc: Error message if the action failed in the app. When present, signals that the mutation could not be completed.

method_not_found.desc: when the API isn't available to the caller

invalid_app_id.desc: App ID is not a valid format

invalid_action.desc: The comment data does not match the original trigger context (e.g., comment_id or thread_root_id mismatch)

missing_comment_data.desc: Required comment fields are missing for the given action type

not_allowed.desc: User is not enrolled in comment syncing

invalid_sender_schema.desc: The sender field could not be transformed to a valid user schema
